name: wefty-fall
description: Wefty falling animation — 6-frame cycle for the Wefty Run game-over fall sequence.

source.format: 2x3 grid sheet (3 cols, 2 rows), generated as a single image

wired.notes: Not yet wired into either platform. Currently in-game uses static wefty_fall.png. Wire by replacing the single-image draw with a 6-frame cycle in WeftyRunScreen.kt and wefty-run.html.
